title: Material Master
learning_objectives: Understand the purpose of the Material Master.
Learn the important views maintained in SAP.
Understand how Material Master integrates with Production Planning.
Learn the standard SAP Transaction Codes used for Material Master.

introduction.title: What is Material Master?
introduction.content: The Material Master is the central repository of information for every material used within an organization. It contains all the data required for purchasing, inventory management, production planning, sales, quality management and accounting. Every material used in SAP is represented by a unique Material Number.

business_purpose.title: Why is Material Master Important?
business_purpose.content: Production Planning depends on accurate Material Master data. It determines how materials are procured, planned, produced, stored and consumed throughout the manufacturing process.

material_types.description: Semi-finished products used in further manufacturing.

important_views.purpose: General information like description, unit of measure and weight.
MRP Type, Reorder Point, Lot Size.

step_by_step_procedure: Choose the required Material Master Views.

integration.purpose: Used for MRP, Production Orders and Scheduling.

business_example.title: Example
business_example.content: A stainless steel coil is created as a Finished Material (FERT). The Material Master stores its planning data, production scheduling parameters, valuation information and inventory details. This information is then used by MRP, Production Planning, Warehouse Management and Sales.

important_notes: Every material has only one unique Material Number.
Material Master is shared across multiple SAP modules.
Incorrect Material Master data affects the entire production process.
